zh.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby是Adam De Reresby的女兒，於1220年3月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。她於大約1239年與Sir Robert Barley在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1272年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby是Adam De Reresby的女儿，于1220年3月出生在英国英格兰越可爾。她于大约1239年与Sir Robert Barley在英国英格兰越可爾瑟结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1272年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby was born in March 1220, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Adam De Reresby. She married Sir Robert Barley about 1239, in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1272, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby est née en mars 1220, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Adam De Reresby. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Barley environ 1239, à Thrybergh, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1272, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby wurde im März 1220 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Adam De Reresby geboren. Sie hat um 1239 in Thrybergh, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Barley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1272 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby è nata il nel marzo 1220 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Adam De Reresby. Lei sposato Sir Robert Barley circa 1239, nel Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1272, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresbyは1220年3月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAdam De Reresbyの娘として生まれた。約1239年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスリバーグでSir Robert Barleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1272年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby(은)는 1220년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Adam De Reresby의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스리버그h에서 Sir Robert Barley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby nasceu em março de 1220, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Adam De Reresby. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Barley aproximadamente 1239, em Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1272, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby родилась марта 1220 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Adam De Reresby. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Barley около 1239 г. в местности трибирг, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1272 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Joan De Reresby nació en marzo de 1220, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Adam De Reresby. Se casó con Sir Robert Barley aproximadamente 1239, en Thrybergh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1272, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
